title: A men's undergarment short with molded pouch
abstract: A men's undergarment short includes an elastic waist band. A body extends from the waist band to a left leg opening for receiving a left leg of the user therethrough and a right leg opening for receiving the right leg of the user there through. The body includes a front panel. A portion of the front panel is molded as a tear drop for receiving the genitalia of a wearer therein. The tear drop portion is more flexible than a remaining area of the front panel.
claims: Claims 1. A menâs undergarment short comprising; an elastic waist band; and a body; the body extending from the waist band to a left leg opening for receiving a left leg of the user therethrough and a right leg opening for receiving the right leg of the user therethrough; the body includes a front panel; a portion of the front panel being molded as a tear drop for receiving the genitalia of a wearer therein; the tear drop portion being more flexible than a remaining area of the front panel. 2. The undergarment short of claim 1, wherein the front panel is formed of a two-ply construction. 3. The undergarment short of claim 2, wherein least an inner facing material of the two-ply construction is a breathable wi eking material. 4. The undergarment short of claim 1, wherein the undergarment is a brief. 5. The undergarment short of claim 2, wherein the brief is a boxer brief.
